cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/textkit/slugify.py b/textkit/slugify.py
index 98efeb6..ea4ba46 100644
--- a/textkit/slugify.py
+++ b/textkit/slugify.py
@@ -1,3 +1,8 @@
+import re
+
+
 def slugify(text):
     """Turn a title into a URL slug."""
-    return text.lower().replace(" ", "-")
+    text = text.lower()
+    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
+    return text.strip("-")

cases.name: forgot_lowercase
cases.diff:
diff --git a/textkit/slugify.py b/textkit/slugify.py
index 98efeb6..8cb2095 100644
--- a/textkit/slugify.py
+++ b/textkit/slugify.py
@@ -1,3 +1,7 @@
+import re
+
+
 def slugify(text):
     """Turn a title into a URL slug."""
-    return text.lower().replace(" ", "-")
+    text = re.sub(r"[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "-", text)
+    return text.strip("-")
